skill_loads_with_agent_reference.template: use skills_agent_builder. What are the required YAML frontmatter fields for an agent definition file? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should mention 'name', 'description', and 'mode' as required fields.
skill_loads_with_agent_reference.description: Verify the agent-builder skill loads and contains agent definition reference information

knows_agent_modes.template: use skills_agent_builder. Explain the three agent mode values and when to use each one. EVAL STATEMENT: The response should describe 'primary' (user-selectable), 'subagent' (delegation only), and 'all' (both) modes.
knows_agent_modes.description: Verify the skill correctly explains primary, subagent, and all modes

knows_skill_patterns.template: use skills_agent_builder. What are the different types of skill body patterns? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should mention documentation-only, script-backed, API-wrapper, and hierarchical patterns.
knows_skill_patterns.description: Verify the skill documents the four skill body patterns

knows_naming_conventions.template: use skills_agent_builder. What naming conventions should I follow for agent names and skill names? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should state that agent names use UPPERCASE-HYPHENATED format and skill names use lowercase-hyphenated format.
knows_naming_conventions.description: Verify the skill explains naming conventions for agents and skills

knows_eval_test_format.template: use skills_agent_builder. How do I create EVAL tests for a skill? What format does the opencode.json file use? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should describe the EVAL/opencode.json structure with template, description, agent, and model fields.
knows_eval_test_format.description: Verify the skill explains EVAL test creation and format

knows_delegation_pattern.template: use skills_agent_builder. How does an agent delegate work to a sub-agent? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should mention using @AGENT-NAME syntax in the agent body for delegation.
knows_delegation_pattern.description: Verify the skill explains agent-to-agent delegation via @NAME syntax

knows_model_selection.template: use skills_agent_builder. What model should I use for an agent that needs deep reasoning about complex problems? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should recommend claude-opus for complex reasoning tasks.
knows_model_selection.description: Verify the skill provides model selection guidance

has_templates.template: use skills_agent_builder. Where can I find templates for creating new agents and skills? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should reference templates in the agent-builder skill directory at .opencode/skill/agent-builder/templates/.
has_templates.description: Verify the skill references its bundled templates
